text:
I've been iterating on docs and implementing a realtime / livecoding interface in my algorithmic composition library <https://github.com/benmca/thuja|Thuja>.  I can actually do a live session now :slightly_smiling_face: but as I practice with the interface I find ways to improve it, so it's still in major flux.
I'm searching for the right tone in the docs - the readme seems simplistic (musically) to me - next step for me is to walk through some of my pieces cookbook-style, laying out more elaborate use cases.
